title: Harris Ultimate Walls & Ceilings Reach Paint Brush | 1.5"
features: The Ultimate Walls and Ceilings Reach Brush makes painting and cutting in around ceilings easier as the longer handle means you can get the ultimate finish in those hard to reach places
Paints Faster * This brush will allow you to paint faster than a Harris Essentials paint brushes saving you time
The patented No-Loss* technology s no bristle loss while you are painting

This brush is our best solution for cutting in around the top of a wall near the ceiling around light fixtures and for painting other hard to reach areas with emulsion paints For best results rinse brush head before use to remove any dust

This brush is made to last! After use with water based paints such as emulsion remove the excess paint and wash in warm soapy water or rinse in clean running water or cleaning fluids Then immediately dry thoroughly *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or if left in a damp area
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! HARRIS 1.5 INCH ULTIMATE WALLS & CEILINGS REACH PAINT BRUSH Contents 1 x 1.5 inch paint brush For Painting Hard To Reach Wall & Ceiling Areas This brush has been specifically designed and engineered to give the ultimate finish when painting hard to reach areas. With guaranteed No Bristle Loss, the angled brush head provides great control and the longer handle gives extra reach, allowing for faster painting. Ideal for cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and other hard to reach areas with emulsion paints. Doing a Painting Project Team this brush with the Ultimate 4" Walls & Ceilings Roller set and the Ultimate 9" Walls & Ceilings Roller set! Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range.
